system.description: The corrupted character’s blood has become acidic. If he has a W4 or greater Wound that has yet to be tended, any character that makes a melee attack against him or otherwise comes in contact with him must make an Endurance save or take a 3/W2 Wound. He can also inflict a W4 Wound upon himself to spray a valid target within melee range with blood. The damage of the attack is equal to the damage taken. This is a Major action and requires something sharp. If the corrupted character has the Lots of Blood mutation, anyone in melee range will need to make defense rolls, not just the target.
